_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Midkine expression is increased both in excitatory...neurons harboring NF1 mutations that are found in NF1 patients that develop OPGs...but not in NF1 +/R1809C neurons
details: iPSC-derived CNS neurons with NF1 mutations (C383X, R681X, E2207X) showed increased midkine expression, but NF1 R1809C neurons did not
